# `cc-journal week`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal week [--date <DATE>] [--rollup] [DATE]`

Print this week's entries or generate rollup

## Arguments

### `[DATE]`

Date within the target week (YYYY-MM-DD)

## Flags

### `--date <DATE>`

Date within the target week (alternative to positional arg)

### `--rollup`

Generate AI-powered weekly rollup instead of listing entries
